docket_entries.description: DECREE CHANGING NAME FILED BY PETITIONER KHISAN, MOHAMED D
PETITION FOR CHANGE OF NAME, RESIDENCY VERIFIED, FILED BY PETITIONER KHISAN, MOHAMED D JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME FILED BY PETITIONER KHISAN, MOHAMED D HEARING SET FOR MAY-03-2016 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 514
COPYING FEES (3 PAGE, 3 CERTIFIED COPY) PAID BY PLAINTIFF KHISAN, MOHAMED D

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PETITIONER KHISAN, MOHAMED D ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

NAME CHANGE CALENDAR OF MAY-03-2016, NAME CHANGE CALENDAR - GRANTED PER WRITTEN DECREE. HEARING NOT REQUIRED. PROOF OF PUBLICATION IN THE CASE FILE. IT APPEARS TO THE SATISFACTION OF THE COURT THAT ALL THE CONTENTIONS IN THE PETITION FOR CHANGE OF NAME ARE TRUE AND CORRECT, AND THAT THE PETITION SHOULD BE GRANTED. THE COURT GRANTS PETITIONER'S REQUEST TO CHANGE HIS NAME FROM MOHAMED D. KHISAN TO SIMON KHISAN. DECREE CHANGING NAME IS SUBMITTED TO AND SIGNED BY THE COURT. JUDGE: JOSEPH M. QUINN. CLERK: MEREDITH GRIER. PROCEEDINGS NOT REPORTED. (D514).
